_comment: Mission-1 batch Phase-3 STAGED reconcile candidates - human approves in the Map client panel. Evidence pulled 2026-07-22/23 (read-only). Previews are FLIGHT-SCOPED (2026-06-01..07-31, matching the spec's table entries and the Grid's Jun-Jul rows) unless noted.
preparedBy: Mission-1 batch prep session (Claude) - see PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md
platformAudit: Three tables, one account each, one Grid row per channel. TTD uses an exact-name rule; Meta's 'ResetData_' token claims all 5 account campaigns (verified full list); Google is an intentional match-all (no shared token across the new AI-product + old bracket-prefixed families) - no scope holds two rules, so overlap is impossible. The Reddit row has NO source (see unmatchable).
warnings: REDDIT DATA BUG (escalate beyond the Grid): perf_reddit's only rows are Cloudflare's ('Transmission_Cloudflare', CLOUD_ACQ_* campaigns) yet they carry client_slug='resetdata' - the resetdata DASHBOARD's Reddit lane filters on that slug and may be showing Cloudflare campaigns as ResetData's. The Grid row itself is unmatchable; the dashboard issue is reported in PHASE3_BATCH_PREP_REPORT.md.

BASIS SPLIT: TTD cost = CLIENT-BILLED (spendMult 3.4707 -> 1 staged); Google/Meta = raw media (mult 1 stays). The Reddit row's mult 2 is the agency's deliberate x2 billed markup - row unmatchable, leave it.
Meta ingest for the account currently ends 2026-07-07; Google (DTS) is fresh to 07-21.

Small residuals vs the sheet (TTD -5.2%, Meta -7.4%, Google -7.8% at the 07-08 vintage) all have the sheet ABOVE BQ - consistent with the sheet's numbers including a few late-May days the flight scope excludes; eyeball at approval.

pairs.rationale: 1 campaign - the always-on continuation (running since 04-10; the spec flight-scopes to the row's Jun-Jul). June-onward $6,254.28; to 07-08 $4,691.48 vs sheet clientSpend $4,949.84 (-5.2%, see warnings). spendMult 3.4707 -> 1 (billed). Excludes the March GTC burst (separate exact name).

Claims all 5 campaigns in the account (Jun26_Acquisition/Jun26_Retargeting/June V1/May26/Apr26 - every name starts 'ResetData_'). June-onward $1,813.88 vs sheet mediaSpend $1,959.24 (-7.4%; ingest ends 07-07). Media basis: mult 1 stays. Account name contains an EN-DASH - the spec carries it exactly.

Match-all within the account, flight-scoped 06-01..07-31 by the spec (no shared token: new 'AI Inference/Enterprise AI/GPU/MSP' campaigns + old '[BRAND]/[SECTOR]' family). June-onward $5,205.87; to 07-08 $3,797.79 vs sheet mediaSpend $4,119.02 (-7.8%, see warnings). Media basis: mult 1 stays. Confirm the panel preserves the empty match value.

unmatchableGridRows.reason: No ResetData Reddit source exists: perf_reddit + reddit_ads_apac_all contain ONLY Cloudflare ('Transmission_Cloudflare'). The old spec entry pointing at 'ResetData Ad Account (100Digital)' matched nothing and was removed this run. Stays sheet-valued (media $897.94, x2 billed markup).

unmatchedBq.note: The March GTC burst (03-16..20) - no Grid row, and outside the flight scope anyway.
